title: crataegus glandulosa var. minor
intro: Crataegus glandulosa var. minor, also known as the small-fruited hawthorn, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family and is a variety of the Crataegus glandulosa tree. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support cardiovascular health and lower blood pressure due to its high content of flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs). The health benefits of Crataegus glandulosa var. minor include improved heart function, reduced inflammation, and antioxidant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various cardiovascular issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as capsules, tinctures, and tea, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with medications.
